name: Chocolate Caramel Nut Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 Box German chocolate cake mix with pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt caramels with 1/3 cup milk in the microwave. Stir until smooth.
2. Combine remaining milk, mix and margarine. Mix well.
3. Press half of cake mixture into the bottom of a greased 13 x 9 baking pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 6 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with 1 cup walnuts and chocolate pieces over the crust.
6. Top with caramel mixture, spreading to the edges of the pan.
7. Top with teaspoonfuls of remaining cake mixture.
8. Sprinkle with additional walnuts.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
10. Cool slightly; cut into bars.
